Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall accept PCAP files in the standard libpcap format (e.g., .pcap, .pcapng).

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The system shall use the following default values for the preprocessor configuration: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the color coding for protocols
Correction: The system shall use distinct colors for each protocol in the network topology graph, e.g., HTTP: blue, FTP: green, TCP: red.

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the visual representation for each protocol
Correction: The system shall use distinct shapes and colors for each protocol in the result graph, e.g., HTTP: blue circle, FTP: green square, TCP: red triangle.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the method for merging performance graphs
Correction: The system shall provide an option to merge performance graphs by overlaying them with different colors for each run.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the zoom functionality for graphs
Correction: The system shall allow users to zoom in and out of graphs using mouse scroll or pinch gestures, and pan the view by clicking and dragging.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the image format for saving graphs
Correction: The system shall save graphs as images in PNG format by default, with options for JPEG and SVG.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the method for selecting runs to compare
Correction: The system shall provide a dropdown menu to select runs for comparison, and an option to overlay or display them side by side.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the asynchronous interaction capabilities
Correction: The system shall allow users to interact with the network topology, performance analysis, and result graphs while the preprocessor is running, without freezing the UI.

Label: /F100/
Issue: Does not specify the statistics to be shown for the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall show the following statistics for the PCAP file: Count of devices, Count of used protocols, Count of packets, Device that sent the most packets.

Label: /F200/
Issue: Does not specify the method for opening graphs in a new window
Correction: The system shall provide a button next to each graph to open it in a new window for detailed viewing.

Label: /F210/
Issue: Does not specify the default key bindings
Correction: The system shall use the following default key bindings: Open session: Ctrl + O, Save session: Ctrl + S, Save session as: Ctrl + Alt + S, Run preprocessor: Ctrl + R.

Label: /F220/
Issue: Does not specify the identifiers for saved sessions
Correction: The system shall include the following identifiers in saved sessions: Hash to identify program version, Hash to identify the PCAP.

Label: /F230/
Issue: Does not specify the warning message for large data
Correction: The system shall display a warning message when opening a PCAP file with more than 2 million packets, indicating potential performance issues.

Label: /F240/
Issue: Does not specify the content of the PDF report
Correction: The system shall include the following in the PDF report: Configurations of preprocessing runs, Results of those configurations, Performance graphs of those configurations.

Label: /P10/
Issue: Does not specify the response time for showing results
Correction: The system shall show results from preprocessing done in this session within 1 second of user request.

Label: /S10/
Issue: Does not specify the method for ensuring data privacy
Correction: The system shall ensure no information about the PCAP is accessible by inspecting the source of the website.

Label: /E10/
Issue: Does not specify the design principles for expandability
Correction: The system shall be designed to allow easy addition or removal of menus, menu items, preprocessor options, and statistics without major restructuring.

Label: /E11/
Issue: Does not specify the documentation requirements
Correction: The system shall include detailed documentation of the code and design to facilitate understanding and extension by future developers.
